Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}We only have so much time to train here, so you have to practice on your own if you want to win![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}Good! And don't forget: Know your limits, and make sure you stretch properly![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}...Oh, {f 4 1}-kun, why don't you give them some advice too?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}{f 5 13 12 5 106}Yeah! But don't forget to stay focused till the end![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}{f 5 13 12 5 106}Yeah! Guts! Spirit! You can do it, I know you can![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}Think positive, and don't give in to fear![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The kids went home after[n]finishing their training.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}Those kids are going to challenge the sixth graders soon.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}Apparently, the winners will get to use the schoolyard.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}Earlier, they asked me to write the challenge letter for them... I'm a little worried, actually.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}Not just about the race, but also about whether or not I spelled something wrong.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}So, what's your honest opinion?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}Age difference really matters when you're as young as they are. Do you really think they can beat the sixth graders?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SEL_010_0_0
Dialog.Option: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}As long as we believe in them.

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}Some of the boys that age are even bigger than me. There's just so much difference in their physical strength.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}{f 5 13 12 5 106}Yeah, you're right! A coach has to believe in her team![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}And they've all trained so hard too![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}They'll be fine, right!? After all, they learned from us![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel a bond forming with Yuko.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It seems we've grown closer...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}Come to think of it, I should've asked you to write the challenge letter, {f 4 1}-kun...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}I probably should've used bigger words... Ugh, I'll be so embarrassed if those sixth graders laugh at it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Yuko and I walked home together.[n]{f 1 1}
